project_meta.aesthetic: Pure dark, sharp edges, high-contrast, technical precision

headings.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-white

micro.eyebrow: text-xs md:text-sm text-primary_volt uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono
micro.label: text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider font-mono

utilities: .hud-panel::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 8px; height: 1px; background-color: #E5FF00; }
.hud-panel::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 1px; height: 8px; background-color: #E5FF00; }

PageHeader.structure: Container > Eyebrow > Title > Optional Action Slot
PageHeader.classes: flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-end gap-4 mb-8 md:mb-12 pb-6 border-b border-[#1A1A24]
PageHeader.eyebrow_classes: text-[#E5FF00] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-xs md:text-sm mb-2 block
PageHeader.title_classes: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-black text-white tracking-tighter uppercase

StatCard.classes: hud-panel rounded-none p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 hover:border-[#2A2A35] transition-colors group
StatCard.trend_up: text-[#00FF66] font-mono text-sm flex items-center gap-1
StatCard.trend_down: text-[#FF3B30] font-mono text-sm flex items-center gap-1

SectionCard.classes: bg-[#0F0F12] border border-[#1A1A24] p-6 md:p-8 rounded-none flex flex-col gap-6

Badge.base: px-2 py-1 font-mono text-xs uppercase border rounded-none tracking-widest

EmptyState.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 md:p-24 border border-dashed border-[#2A2A35] bg-[#0F0F12]/50 text-center gap-4
EmptyState.icon_wrapper: p-4 bg-[#1A1A24] border border-[#2A2A35] mb-2 text-[#70707B]
EmptyState.title: text-xl font-bold text-white uppercase
EmptyState.cta: mt-4 btn-ghost border border-[#E5FF00] text-[#E5FF00] hover:bg-[#E5FF00] hover:text-black rounded-none px-6 py-2 uppercase font-mono text-sm tracking-widest transition-all

Skeleton.shimmer_layer: before:absolute before:inset-0 before:-translate-x-full before:animate-shimmer before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-white/5 before:to-transparent

ChatBubble.ai: bg-[#0F0F12] border border-[#2A2A35] border-l-[#E5FF00] border-l-2 p-6 rounded-none shadow-lg text-gray-300 font-mono text-sm max-w-[85%]
ChatBubble.user: bg-[#1A1A24] border border-[#2A2A35] p-4 rounded-none text-white max-w-[75%] ml-auto text-sm
ChatBubble.typing_indicator: flex gap-1 items-center h-6 px-2 text-[#E5FF00]

SuggestionChip.classes: border border-[#2A2A35] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#1A1A24] hover:border-[#E5FF00] text-[#A0A0AB] hover:text-[#E5FF00] px-4 py-2 rounded-none text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest transition-all cursor-pointer text-left

Table.header: bg-[#1A1A24] text-[#A0A0AB] font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-left

Navbar.layout: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-md bg-[#0F0F12]/90 border-b border-[#2A2A35]
Navbar.nav_links: font-mono uppercase text-sm tracking-widest text-[#A0A0AB] hover:text-white transition-colors relative px-2 py-4
Navbar.nav_active: text-[#E5FF00] after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:w-full after:h-[2px] after:bg-[#E5FF00]

Dashboard.layout: Bento Grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-6
blocks: Health Score (col-span-full md:col-span-2 row-span-2) - Features large circular SVG Gauge with #00FF66 or #E5FF00 stroke.
Quick Actions (col-span-1) - Square tiles using tile-hover.
Recent Activity (col-span-full) - Wide section using Table component.

MyPC.layout: Tabs top navigation (border-b border-[#2A2A35], tab active is border-b-2 border-[#E5FF00]). Below tabs, grid layout for telemetry.
MyPC.telemetry: Cards displaying live data. Use colored gauges or status bars. CPU/GPU cards use #00E0FF or #FF3B30 based on temps.

Tracker.layout: Grid of SectionCards. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6.
Tracker.card_content: Header (Product name + Status Badge), Body (Large Current Price + Sparkline chart), Footer (Target progress bar using #E5FF00).

AI_Advisor.layout: Terminal-style chat interface. Max-width container (max-w-4xl). Main scrollable area for ChatBubbles. Sticky bottom input area.
AI_Advisor.input_area: bg-[#0F0F12] border-t border-[#2A2A35] p-4. Input field: bg-[#1A1A24] border border-[#2A2A35] focus:border-[#E5FF00] rounded-none text-white font-mono p-4 w-full outline-none.

motion_guidelines.entrance: framer-motion stagger children. container variants with staggerChildren: 0.1. Item variants: hidden { opacity: 0, y: 10 } visible { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { type: 'spring', stiffness: 100 } }.
motion_guidelines.hover: Scale transforms are FORBIDDEN (no bouncing). Use border color changes, text glows, and background shifts. e.g., hover:border-[#E5FF00].
motion_guidelines.prefers_reduced_motion: Ensure framer-motion respects reduced motion natively or via useReducedMotion hook.

accessibility.focus: All focusable elements must have focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#E5FF00] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#050505]
accessibility.contrast: Text must meet APCA or WCAG AA. Use #A0A0AB for muted text against #0F0F12 (meets 4.5:1).
accessibility.aria: Include aria-live="polite" for telemetry updates and AI chat responses.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT change any functionality, routing, or existing data-testids.
CRITICAL: Use .js extensions for React files. Do NOT create .tsx files.
CRITICAL: ALL text must use the react-i18next `t()` function. No hardcoded English or Italian text.
Add the new utilities defined in `css_utilities_to_add` to `/app/frontend/src/index.css`.
Ensure all new interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes in kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid="ai-chat-input"`).
Apply generous spacing. Panels should pad content with at least p-6 or p-8.
Maintain the strict 'Tactical HUD' aesthetic: NO rounded corners anywhere (`rounded-none`).
Do NOT touch the landing page route/components.
